teal-500.$description: Maycation brand teal; primary accent in dark mode

teal-on.$description: Near-black used as text on teal accent backgrounds

blue-500.$description: Blue; used for travel kind badge and editor role pill

amber-500.$description: Amber; used for reservation kind badge, attention state, and expired invite

purple-500.$description: Lavender-purple; used for note kind badge and viewer role pill

red-500.$description: Muted red; used for danger state borders

neutral-100.$description: Near-white; primary text, headings, strong labels. Maps to CSS --text-h in dark mode

neutral-200.$description: Blue-gray; secondary body text. Maps to CSS --text in dark mode

neutral-300.$description: Mid-gray; muted metadata text. Hardcoded in Visual System consolidation pass for .muted, .day-tile__summary

neutral-700.$description: Dark border; opaque border for non-glass components. Maps to CSS --border in dark mode

neutral-800.$description: Near-black; base color for glass morphism surfaces before opacity is applied

neutral-850.$description: Control surface background in dark mode. Maps to CSS --control-bg

neutral-900.$description: Deep panel background. Maps to CSS --panel

neutral-950.$description: Deepest background; maps to legacy CSS --input-bg. Superseded as the canonical input surface by black-a28 (rgba(0,0,0,0.28)) in the glass morphism system; retained as a primitive

black-a28.$description: Black at 28% opacity; canonical form input background in the glass morphism system. Composites over glass surfaces. Canonical value from Visual System consolidation block

danger-bg.$description: Translucent red; danger state surface fill

danger-text.$description: Soft pink; readable danger message text on dark backgrounds

glass-surface.$description: Glass morphism background for cards, panels, modals. Neutral-800 at 74% opacity

glass-border.$description: Subtle white edge for glass surfaces

white-a10.$description: White at 10% opacity; slightly brighter than glass-border; used for interactive control element borders (form inputs, pills, secondary buttons)

default.$description: Fallback panel background; used before glass morphism is applied

input.$description: Form input background; transparent overlay that composites over glass surfaces. Canonical value from Visual System consolidation block

glass.$description: Primary surface for cards, panels, and modals with backdrop blur
Translucent white border for glass surfaces

control.$description: Border for interactive control elements; form inputs, select, textarea, role/status/progress pills, secondary buttons. Intentionally brighter than border.glass to signal interactivity

primary.$description: Headings, strong text, labels on dark backgrounds

secondary.$description: Body text; maps to CSS --text variable

muted.$description: Metadata, summaries, day-tile subheadings; differs from text.secondary — see unresolved note in token inventory

default.$description: Brand accent; used on eyebrows, interactive focus rings, hover borders

text.$description: Text color for use on accent-colored backgrounds
Danger state text; readable on dark surfaces

activity.$description: Activity planner item kind badge border; shares the brand accent color

travel.$description: Travel planner item kind badge border

reservation.$description: Reservation planner item kind badge border

note.$description: Note planner item kind badge border

owner.$description: Owner role pill border; shares the brand accent color

default.$description: Modal backdrop; applied to the full-screen dim layer
